reviewed_head.subject: Complete iteration-0003 preparatory implement slice for the OpenAI-backed conversations_api rebase

review_scope.limitation: acceptable as a preparatory bounded slice only; not approvable for IMPLEMENT -> VERIFY

verdict.summary: The packet is acceptable as a preparatory implement slice, but the conversations_api lane is still not closed for IMPLEMENT -> VERIFY and promotion must remain pending.

findings.summary: The packet still declares that the official-surface rebase is not complete, so implement_to_verify must remain pending.
The bounded slice is acceptable only as prepared-for-rebase, not as a fully rebased and resume-ready lane.
The next slice should complete the actual OpenAI-backed rebase and then recreate the implement review request under a new iteration.

next_patch_set: Open iteration-0004 for the actual official-surface conversations_api lane rebase
Rebase the inventory and bundle-boundary artifacts on the ACM OpenAI contract without provisional source-basis flags
Recreate the implement review bundle with iteration-0004 identifiers
